name: Chano

skills.name: Hunting
skills.description: Whenever he moves through brush, gains Movement Speed and enhances his next Basic Attack to a double shot that deals extra damage. Leaps when emerging from brush.

skills.name: Soaring Signal
skills.description: Leaps into the air, gaining Movement Speed and allowing him to traverse terrain. While airborne, his Basic Attack fires a powerful arrow, dealing physical damage and knocking back enemies.

skills.name: Lupine Trap
skills.description: Throws a wolf spirit trap at a target location. When triggered, it deals physical damage and summons a wolf spirit to attack the enemy.

skills.name: Leader Stance
skills.description: Summons wolf spirits and gains the ability to shoot while moving. Also boosts Physical Attack, Movement Speed, and Attack Speed for 8s.

skillsZh.name: 追獵
skillsZh.description: 蒼穿越草叢獲得加速，離開草叢時觸發跳躍指令，下一次普攻強化為二連射，額外造成傷害。

skillsZh.name: 翔躍為號
skillsZh.description: 蒼躍至空中，可以穿越地形並獲得加速。在空中進行普攻，射出強力一箭，造成物理傷害並擊退敵人。

skillsZh.name: 狼魂陷阱
skillsZh.description: 蒼向指定位置投擲狼魂陷阱，敵人踩中後受到物理傷害，同時自身召喚一隻狼魂對觸發者進行攻擊。

skillsZh.name: 領袖姿態
skillsZh.description: 蒼召喚狼魂，同時自身獲得騎射能力，增加攻擊力、移速和攻速，持續8秒。

tipsZh: 蒼（發育路）：梯度 B，勝率 50.12%（Camp HOK）。
出裝：逐日之弓、末世、賢者的庇護.

faqs.question: Is Chano good in current season?
faqs.answer: Chano is Tier B Marksman with 50.12% win rate, 0.64% pick rate, and 0.07% ban rate (Camp HOK international).

faqs.question: What is the best Chano build?
faqs.answer: Recommended: Sunchaser, Doomsday, Sage's Sanctuary, Destiny, Haste - Sunpool, Immovable - Sky Dome.

faqs.question: How to counter Chano?
faqs.answer: Pick Ziya, Mai Shiranui. Strong into Liu Bei, Shouyue.

faqsZh.question: 蒼 這版本適合上分嗎？
faqsZh.answer: 蒼 為 B 梯度，勝率 50.12%、選取 0.64%、禁用 0.07%（Camp HOK 國際服）。

faqsZh.question: 蒼 出裝怎麼搭配？
faqsZh.answer: 推薦：逐日之弓、末世、賢者的庇護、名刀・司命、迅疾・日淵、不動・天穹.

faqsZh.question: 怎麼克制 蒼？
faqsZh.answer: 可選 Ziya、Mai Shiranui。蒼 克制 Liu Bei、Shouyue。

metaAnalysis: Counters: Liu Bei, Shouyue. Weak into: Ziya, Mai Shiranui.

guide.overview: Chano is a Medium Marksman (Farm Lane) on Honor of Kings Global. Camp HOK ranks them Tier B with 50.5% win rate and 0.7% pick rate as of 2026-06-05.
guide.hook: Chano: Whenever he moves through brush, gains Movement Speed and enhances his next Basic Attack to a double shot that deals extra damage.
guide.bestBuild: Rush Boots of Dexterity, Eternity Blade, Shadow Ripper, then complete Bloodweeper, Daybreaker's Virtue, Master Sword. Use preset tabs for jungle, clash, or CN-style paths when draft requires it.
guide.arcanaSpells: Run Cataclysm for stats that match Chano's Marksman kit. Take Haste & Flash — swap to Purify against heavy CC or Smite when jungling.
guide.combo: Standard trade: Soaring Signal → Lupine Trap → Leader Stance → weave basic attacks. Weave basic attacks between skill casts for passive value.

skillOrder.priority: Skill 1 → Skill 2 → Leader Stance (max Skill 1 first)
skillOrder.reason: Soaring Signal is your lane trade tool. Lupine Trap second. Leader Stance whenever available.

combos.name: Standard trade
combos.steps: Soaring Signal → Lupine Trap → Leader Stance → weave basic attacks
combos.when: Farm Lane skirmish or objective fight

arcanaRows.effect: Adjust Purify/Execute based on enemy dive.

guide.laning: Last-hit safely until first core item. Ping jungler for river vision; never face-check brush without minion cover.
guide.teamfight: Position behind frontline; attack closest safe target. Join fight only after enemy dive cooldowns are used.
guide.highRank: Chano sits at Tier B globally (50.5% WR). In high rank, pick only into favorable matchups or when you have a dedicated pocket pick.
comparisons: Chano vs Hou Yi (Marksman, Tier S+): Hou Yi is 2.9% pick / 49.3% WR. Chano has +1.2% WR vs Hou Yi in Camp data. Choose Chano when you need Farm Lane identity; choose Hou Yi for Farm Lane comfort.

Chano vs Marco Polo (Marksman, Tier S+): Marco Polo is 2.1% pick / 50.1% WR. Chano has +0.5% WR vs Marco Polo in Camp data. Choose Chano when you need Farm Lane identity; choose Marco Polo for Farm Lane comfort.

matchups.summary: Chano excels into Liu Bei, Shouyue. Avoid blind picking into Ziya, Mai Shiranui without team peel.
